channel.title: Daily Feed (Updated 9 AM BD)
channel.description: Daily Feed (Updated 9 AM BD) generated by script

item.title: The UN Refugee Agency’s New Boss in Mexico Has Her Work Cut Out for Her
item.description: Chiara Cardoletti is the new representative for the United Nations Refugee Agency in Mexico. She arrives at an extremely challenging moment for the organization in Latin America, as well as for its overall operations, led by a new high commissioner installed earlier this year and a possible deputy from the United States to be appointed. ... Read more
